verses.text: Persia kumpi Sairas' uk kum khatna kumin, Jeremiah tung tawnin Topa' thugen a tun' theihna dingin, ama gamsung khempeuhah taangkona khat bawlin lai-in zong a gelhna dingin Persia kumpi Sairas' lungsimah Topa in a suaksak hi. Amah in hih bangin a hih hi

“Persia kumpi Sairas in hih bangin ci hi: Vantung Pasian, Topa in leitung kumpi gam khempeuh keima tungah hong pia khin a, Judah gamsung Jerusalem khua-ah ama-a' dingin biakinn khat ka lamsak ding hong sawl hi
Note lakah ama mi peuhmah a Pasian in ompih hen la, Judah gamsung Jerusalem khua-ah paito hen la, Israel Pasian, Topa' biakinn lamkik hen. Amah pen Jerusalem-ah a om Pasian ahi hi

Tua ciangin koilai mun koilai gama om hita leh Judah mi a omlai khempeuh, ama omna mun mite in Jerusalem-a om Pasian' biakinn-a dingin utthu-a a piakte uh banah, ngun leh kham, nate leh ganhingte tawh zong huh ciat uh hen,” a ci hi.

Tua ciangin Judah leh Benjamin sunga innkuan lutangte, leh siampite leh Levi mite, Jerusalem khua-a om Topa' biakinn a lamkik dingin a lungsim sung uhah Pasian in a suahsak mite khempeuh kithawi uh hi
Tua ciangin a veng a pamte in thatang tawh a huh uh banah ngun tawh kibawl umlebeel, kham, van tuamtuamte, ganhingte, leh letsong manphate tawh huh thuah lai uh hi
Tua thamloin, Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem panin puakhia-in ama pasian-te' biakinn sungah a koihsa ahi Topa' biakinn-a om ngei umlebeelte zong kumpipa Sairas in pusuah hi
Persia kumpi Sairas in hihte pusuahin sumkempa Mithredath' khutsungah ap hi. Tuapa in Judah ukpa Sheshbazzar-a' dingin a malzah simin sazian bawlsak hi
Tua nate a phazah: Kham kuang tul khat, ngun kuang tul khat, umlebeel a nam tuamtuam sawmnihlekua
kham kuang-uk sawmthum, ngun kuang-uk a nam tuamtuam za li sawm khat, leh umlebeel adang tul khat ahi hi
Kham leh ngun kibawl umlebeelte khempeuh a vekpi-in tul nga za li sawmgukkua pha hi. Tua hi a, Babylon panin salte a kiciahpih kik ciangin Sheshbazzar in tua nate khempeuh Jerusalem-ah a ciahpih hi.
